const casinos = {
  atlantis:   { cls:'atlantis',   url:'https://atlantisplay.cc/',        logoHtml:`<div class="casino-logo">ATLANTIS<span class="logo-sub">PLAY CASINO</span></div>` },
  betargento: { cls:'betargento', url:'https://betargento.online/',       logoHtml:`<div class="casino-logo"><span class="bet">BET</span><span class="arg">ARGENTO</span><span class="logo-sub">CASINO ONLINE</span></div>` },
  mijugada:   { cls:'mijugada',   url:'https://www.mijugada.online/',     logoHtml:`<div class="casino-logo"><span class="mi-w">MI</span> <span class="mi-col">JUGADA</span><span class="logo-sub">CASINO ONLINE</span></div>` },
};

const rankLabels = ['','🥇 #1 del día','🥈 #2 del día','🥉 #3 del día'];
const rankCls    = ['','rank-1','rank-2','rank-3'];

let currentDay = new Date().getDay();

function buildCards(day) {
  document.getElementById('dayName').textContent = dayNames[day];
  const today = bonuses[day];
  const sorted = Object.entries(today).sort((a,b) => a[1].rank - b[1].rank);
  const container = document.getElementById('cardsContainer');
  container.innerHTML = '';
  sorted.forEach(([key, bonus]) => {
    const c = casinos[key];
    const card = document.createElement('a');
    card.className = `casino-card ${c.cls}`;
    card.href = c.url; card.target = '_blank'; card.rel = 'noopener';
    card.innerHTML = `
      <div class="card-top">
        ${c.logoHtml}
        <div class="card-right">
          <span class="rank-pill ${rankCls[bonus.rank]}">${rankLabels[bonus.rank]}</span>
          <div class="arrow-circle">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
              <path d="M5 12h14M13 6l6 6-6 6"/>
            </svg>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="bonus-box">
        <div class="bonus-icon">${bonus.icon}</div>
        <div class="bonus-content">
          <div class="bonus-label">Bono del día</div>
          <div class="bonus-desc">${bonus.desc}</div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    container.appendChild(card);
  });

}



function enterSite() {
  document.getElementById('overlay').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('main').classList.add('visible');
}
function blockSite() {
  document.getElementById('overlay').innerHTML = `
    <div class="age-card" style="text-align:center">
      <div style="font-size:52px;margin-bottom:16px">🔞</div>
      <div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:10px">Acceso restringido</div>
      <div style="font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45)">Debés ser mayor de 18 años para ingresar.</div>
    </div>`;
}

buildCards(currentDay);
